name: Little Creek Golf Course
about: Little Creek Golf Course is a public, championship 18-hole golf course that also features amenities including Olympic-sized swimming pool, a conference center, and an on-site restaurant. The venue offers two golf simulators, allowing players to play virtual rounds at St. Andrews or host birthday putt-putt events. Professional staff are on hand to assist with the latest equipment, practice areas, and tee times. The facility is designed to provide a complete experience for golfers, with club and cart rentals, a pro shop, and space for various events.
why_golfers_like_it: Features two golf simulators for virtual play on famous courses like St. Andrews
Professional staff and on-site pro shop with club rentals and practice areas
Hosts major golf championships, offering a true test for players of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Eagles Nest Restaurant open for lunch and catering for special events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the pro shop, so bringing your own clubs is optional.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned; the Eagles Nest Restaurant is available on-site.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the duration for an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Little Creek Golf Course has an Olympic-sized swimming pool and offers swim lessons, making it kid-friendly.
